result:
All changes have been implemented and verified. Here's a summary of what was changed:

## Changes Made

### 1. Core Default Value Change
**`ktlint-rule-engine-core/src/main/kotlin/.../CodeStyleEditorConfigProperty.kt`**
- Changed `defaultValue` from `CodeStyleValue.intellij_idea` to `CodeStyleValue.ktlint_official` (line 49)
- Updated the property type description to reflect that `ktlint_official` is now the default (lines 40-41)
- Removed the comment about future migration since it's now completed (lines 50-53)
- Updated the `ktlint_official` enum doc comment from "will become the default" to "is the default" (line 32)

### 2. Test Updates
**`ktlint-rule-engine-core/src/test/kotlin/.../EditorConfigTest.kt`**
- Updated assertion for default code style test from `SOME_PROPERTY_VALUE_INTELLIJ_IDEA` to `SOME_PROPERTY_VALUE_OFFICIAL` (line 39)
- Updated "unset" property test assertion from `SOME_PROPERTY_VALUE_INTELLIJ_IDEA` to `SOME_PROPERTY_VALUE_OFFICIAL` (line 222)
- Updated mapping test to use `ktlintOfficialCodeStyleDefaultValue` instead of `intellijIdeaCodeStyleDefaultValue` (lines 121-122)

**`ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/test/kotlin/.../ParameterWrappingRuleTest.kt`**
- Fixed two tests flagged with TODO comments: updated expected formatted code to use proper indentation (4 spaces) for wrapped types, which is the `ktlint_official` behavior
- Removed the TODO comments since the default code style change is now complete

### 3. Documentation Updates
**`documentation/snapshot/docs/rules/configuration-ktlint.md`** and **`documentation/release-latest/docs/rules/configuration-ktlint.md`**
- Updated to state `ktlint_official` is the default code style
- Removed the note about future change to `ktlint_official` in 1.0

**`documentation/snapshot/docs/rules/code-styles.md`** and **`documentation/release-latest/docs/rules/code-styles.md`**
- Updated intro text to reflect `ktlint_official` is now the default
- Removed "Be aware that the default code style will be changed to `ktlint_official`" note
